name: Savory Pork & Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup (10 3/4 oz)
1/2 lb Fresh green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 10 minutes. Cook time: 30 minutes.
1. In a skillet, heat 1 tablespoon hot margarine over medium heat. Cook the pork chops for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides. Remove and set aside.
2. In the remaining margarine, cook the mushrooms with rosemary until tender and all liquid has evaporated, stirring frequently.
3. Add the cream of mushroom soup, water, and green beans to the skillet. Bring to a boil. Return the pork chops to the skillet. Cover and simmer over low heat for 10 minutes or until the chops are no longer pink and the green beans are tender, stirring occasionally. Serve with hot cooked fettuccine. Serves 4.
If desired, substitute 1 package (9 oz) frozen cut green beans.
